title: Earn Double-Digit Income With Options (October 2023)
text: We explain why selling cash-covered puts and covered calls are relatively safe choices for earning a high income. title: Applied Materials Announces Cash Dividend
text: SANTA CLARA, Calif., Sept. 07, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Applied Materials, Inc. today announced that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.32 per share payable on the company's common stock. The dividend is payable on Dec. 14, 2023 to shareholders of record as of Nov. 24, 2023.
